project_name: Southern Horizons Hotel - Luxury AI Transformation

identity.mission: Transform a SaaS dashboard into a world-class luxury hotel website (Aman + Four Seasons + Ritz-Carlton).
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix hospitality warmth with AI intelligence.
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel curated, not transactional.
Content is King: Editorial layouts, not dashboard grids.
Zoom In: Intimate details of textures and spaces.
Negative Space: Value the empty areas for breathing room.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headlines, and feature names.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, buttons, and booking inputs.

mono.usage: Only for technical AI details (e.g., 'Processing request...') or small micro-labels.

colors.theme_strategy: Warm Luxury. Light backgrounds (Ivory/Stone) with Serif typography. Dark accents (Deep Charcoal) for footers or specific 'evening' modes. Avoid pure black and pure white.

visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px) for a sharp, editorial look. Max 4px for buttons.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No CSS gradients. Use natural light and shadow in images. Subtle mesh gradients only for AI interaction backgrounds (Champagne to Ivory).

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Section padding: py-24 or py-32. Element gap: gap-8 or gap-12.

grid_modes.editorial: Bento Grid Mode A (Asymmetric). Mix large hero images with smaller detail shots and text blocks.

components.name: HeroSection
components.description: Full-screen cinematic experience. Image or video background. Minimal text. Bottom-aligned floating booking bar.
components.instructions: Use full viewport height (h-screen). Title in Cormorant Garamond (text-6xl md:text-8xl). Subtitle in Manrope. Booking bar floats at bottom 10%.

components.name: BookingBar
components.description: Sticky, glassmorphic bar for checking availability and accessing AI Concierge.
components.instructions: Horizontal layout. Date picker, Guests selector, 'Check Availability' button (Primary Color). 'Ask Concierge' button (Ghost variant with sparkle icon).

components.name: ExperienceSection
components.description: Showcase of amenities (Dining, Spa, Events) using Bento Grid.
components.instructions: Use grid-cols-12. Feature one large item (col-span-8) and two smaller items. sophisticated hover effects (image zoom, text reveal).

components.name: RoomCard
components.instructions: Image top (aspect-[4/3] or [3/2]). Title (Serif). Price (Sans). 'AI Recommended' badge (Gold border, transparent bg). No heavy shadows.

components.name: AIConciergeOverlay
components.description: A full-screen or large modal overlay that acts as the intelligent concierge.
components.instructions: Not a chat bubble. A conversational interface. 'Good evening, how may I assist you?'. Input field is large and central. Responses are elegant cards, not chat bubbles.

components.name: Footer
components.instructions: Background: #0F1115. Text: #F7F3EE. 4 columns. Newsletter signup. Social links. Copyright.

assets.icons: Lucide React (thin stroke, 1px or 1.5px). Gold or Charcoal color.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update `tailwind.config.js` and `index.css` with the new color palette and typography. Import fonts from Google Fonts.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create `BookingBar.jsx` and `HeroSection.jsx` first as they define the first impression.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Refactor `Home.jsx` to use the new layout strategy (Hero -> Intro -> Experiences -> Rooms).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Transform the existing AI booking flow into `AIConciergeOverlay.jsx`. It should feel like a dialogue, not a form wizard.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure all text uses the correct font family (Headings = Cormorant, Body = Manrope).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle noise.
Do NOT use standard shadow classes. Use custom soft shadows.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standards).
Use `framer-motion` for entrance animations (fade-up, slow reveal).
Never use the standard 'blue' link color. Use Primary or Accent color.
Mobile Responsiveness is paramount. Stack grids on mobile.
